title: Update clinic branding, real content, Birds category, and additional services

requirements.summary: Update homepage hero and About Us section with real treatVET clinic details, stats, address, and emergency service highlights
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage hero displays 'treatVET' as the clinic name and 'Veterinary Care Treatment' as the tagline or subtitle.
Stat counters/badges show: 24/7, 4+ Experts, 1700+ Animals Treated, 82% Satisfaction, Since 2017.
About Us / contact section displays the full address: treatVET, Tulatali (in front of Padua High School), Padua - 4397, Lohagara, Chittagong.
A highlighted callout or badge communicates the 24/7 emergency house-visit service.
Standby veterinary specialist availability is mentioned on the homepage.

file_operations.description: Update the hero section to display 'treatVET' as the clinic name with 'Veterinary Care Treatment' as the tagline. Update stat badges/counters to show: 24/7 availability, 4+ Veterinary Experts, 1700+ Animals Treated, 82% Client Satisfaction, and Since 2017. Add or update the About Us section to display the full clinic address: treatVET, Tulatali (in front of Padua High School), Padua - 4397, Lohagara, Chittagong. Add a highlighted callout or badge for the 24/7 emergency house-visit service ('In emergency cases, we visit the animal owner's house at any time'). Mention the standby veterinary specialist availability.

requirements.summary: Update Footer component with real treatVET clinic contact information including address, 24/7 availability, and emergency house-visit highlight
acceptanceCriteria: Footer shows clinic name 'treatVET' and full address.
Footer shows 24/7 availability note.
Footer references emergency house-visit service.

file_operations.description: Update the Footer component to display the clinic name 'treatVET' and the full address: treatVET, Tulatali (in front of Padua High School), Padua - 4397, Lohagara, Chittagong. Add a 24/7 availability note and include a reference or highlight for the emergency house-visit service.

requirements.summary: Add 'Birds / Poultry' as a fourth animal category throughout the frontend, including filters, appointment form, treatment sections, vaccination sections, and homepage cards
acceptanceCriteria: Backend animal category type includes a Birds/Poultry variant.
Services page filter includes 'Birds / Poultry' as a category filter option.
Appointment booking form includes 'Birds / Poultry' in the animal category dropdown.
Treatment Management page includes a 'Birds / Poultry' accordion section.
Vaccination page includes a 'Birds / Poultry' section.
Homepage animal category cards include a Birds / Poultry card alongside Pets, Large Ruminants, and Small Ruminants.

file_operations.description: Add 'Birds / Poultry' as a selectable category filter option alongside Pets, Large Ruminants, and Small Ruminants. Map this to the backend ServiceCategory.birdsPoultry enum value.
Add 'Birds / Poultry' to the animal category dropdown in the appointment booking form. Ensure it maps correctly to ServiceCategory.birdsPoultry when submitted to the backend.

Add a fourth TreatmentCategorySection for 'Birds / Poultry' treatments, filtering services by ServiceCategory.birdsPoultry. Display it alongside the existing Large Ruminants, Small Ruminants, and Pets sections.

Add a 'Birds / Poultry' vaccination section that filters services by ServiceCategory.birdsPoultry. Display it alongside the existing category sections with a header, count badge, and VaccinationEntry components.

Add a fourth animal category card for 'Birds / Poultry' alongside the existing Pets, Large Ruminants, and Small Ruminants cards. Wire the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/animal-birds.dim_600x400.png to this card. Display the cards in the order: Pets, Large Animals, Small Animals, Birds/Poultry.

requirements.summary: Surface new service types on Services page and appointment booking form: Post-Mortem & Poultry Diagnosis, Ration Formulation Consultation, and Animal Housing Planning
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Post-Mortem & Poultry Diagnosis' service exists in the backend under the Birds/Poultry category with a note about 15+ hours/day availability.
A 'Ration Formulation Consultation' service exists in the backend under the Consultation type.
An 'Animal Housing Planning' service exists in the backend under the Consultation type.
All three services appear as cards on the Services page.
All three services are selectable in the appointment booking form's service dropdown.

file_operations.description: Ensure the Services page grid displays all services fetched from the backend, including the newly seeded Post-Mortem & Poultry Diagnosis, Ration Formulation Consultation, and Animal Housing Planning services. No code changes may be needed if the page already lists all services dynamically; verify that the ServiceCard component renders these new entries correctly with their category and type badges.

Verify that the service dropdown dynamically populates from the backend and includes the new Post-Mortem & Poultry Diagnosis, Ration Formulation Consultation, and Animal Housing Planning services. Ensure the dynamic filtering by selected animal category still works correctly for Birds/Poultry and other categories.

requirements.summary: Update Navigation bar logo and brand name to 'treatVET' with subtitle 'Veterinary Care Treatment' and update browser tab title
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar logo/brand text reads 'treatVET'.
Navigation bar shows 'Veterinary Care Treatment' as a subtitle or tagline.
Browser tab title is 'treatVET – Veterinary Care Treatment'.

file_operations.description: Update the logo/brand text to display 'treatVET' as the clinic name and add 'Veterinary Care Treatment' as a subtitle or tagline beneath or alongside the logo.
Update the <title> tag in the HTML head to 'treatVET – Veterinary Care Treatment' so the browser tab displays the correct clinic name and tagline.

requirements.summary: Wire generated animal hero/banner images for homepage animal category cards in the correct order: Pets, Large Animals, Small Animals, Birds/Poultry
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage animal category section shows four cards with distinct images for Pets, Large Animals, Small Animals, and Birds/Poultry in that order.
Images are loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated.
Each image is visually representative of its animal category.

file_operations.description: Wire the generated animal hero images to the homepage animal category cards in this order: (1) Pets – frontend/public/assets/generated/animal-pets.dim_600x400.png, (2) Large Animals – frontend/public/assets/generated/animal-large.dim_600x400.png, (3) Small Animals – frontend/public/assets/generated/animal-small.dim_600x400.png, (4) Birds/Poultry – frontend/public/assets/generated/animal-birds.dim_600x400.png. Ensure each card displays the corresponding image as a static asset.
